description: PTK workflow with two controls and two treatments
name: PTK_template

model.description: Combines multiple exposure times from PamGene PS12 images.

factors.name: Measurement
factors.description:
Select the factor that defines the values to use in the computation.

Example:
* Median_SigmBg (default)

factors.name: Series
factors.description:
Select the factor which defines the sequence of images.

Example:
* Exposure Time (default)

factors.name: Variable
factors.description:
Select the peptide identifier.

Example:
* ID (default)

factors.name: Group
factors.description:
Select images for each cycle.

Multiple factors are required.

Example:
* Barcode,Row and Cycle (default)
* Barcode, Array and Cycle

filters.name: Measurement2
filters.description:
Select a filter to exclude saturated signal.

Example:
* Signal_Saturation (default)

defaultFactors.name: Measurement
defaultFactors.description:
Select the factor that defines the values to use in the computation.

Example:
* Median_SigmBg (default)

defaultFactors.name: Series
defaultFactors.description:
Select the factor which defines the sequence of images.

Example:
* Exposure Time (default)

defaultFactors.name: Variable
defaultFactors.description:
Select the peptide identifier.

Example:
* ID (default)

defaultFactors.name: Group
defaultFactors.description:
Select images for each cycle.

Multiple factors are required.

Example:
* Barcode,Row and Cycle (default)
* Barcode, Array and Cycle

defaultFilters.name: Measurement2
defaultFilters.description:
Select a filter to exclude saturated signal.

Example:
* Signal_Saturation (default)

factors.description:

Example:

factors.name: Variable
factors.description:

factors.description:

factors.name: Measurement
factors.description:
Select the factor that defines the values to use in the computation.

Example:
* log transform of S100
* log transformed and ComBat Corrected S100
* VSN transformed S100
* VSN transformed and ComBat Corrected S100

factors.name: Group
factors.description:
Select the factor that defines the comparison groups.

Example:
* Test Condition
* Treatment off chip

factors.name: Variable
factors.description:
Select the peptide identifier.

Example:
* ID

factors.name: Supergroup
factors.description:
Select a factor that identifies the Supergroup. Supergroup(s) define each comparison group for which t-tests should be calculated. Leave blank if there is only one comparison group. 

Example:
* Supergroup
* Cell line
* Genotype

factors.name: Observation
factors.description:
Select the factor(s) defining a single value per cell.

Example:
* Barcode and Row
* Barcode and Array
 * Sample Name

factors.name: Pair
factors.description:
Select the factor which defines the pairing.

Example:
* Barcode
* Cell line
* Replicate
* Supergroup

factors.name: Measurement
factors.description:
Select the factor that defines the values to use in the computation.

Example:
* log/VSN transform of S100
* log/VSN transform and ComBat Corrected S100
* FC-base UKA: FC.subtract.value

factors.name: Group
factors.description:
For Comparison-based UKA, select the factor that defines the comparison groups.

Example:
* Test Condition
* Treatment off chip.

 For FC-based UKA, keep it empty.

factors.name: Variable
factors.description:
Select the peptide identifier.

Example:
* ID

factors.name: Supergroup
factors.description:
For Comparison-based UKA, select a factor that identifies the Supergroup. UKA is run for each group comparison within a Supergroup. 
Example:
* Supergroup
* Replicate
* Cell line

For FC-based UKA, this is the factor that defines the observation. 
Example: 
* Sample_name

factors.name: Observation
factors.description:
For Comparison-based UKA, select the factor(s) defining a single value per cell.

Example:
* Barcode and Row
* Barcode and Array
* Sample Name

 For FC-based UKA, keep it empty.

factors.name: Measurement
factors.description:
Select the factor that defines the values to use in the computation.

Example:
* log/VSN transform of S100
* log/VSN transform and ComBat Corrected S100
* FC-base UKA: FC.subtract.value

factors.name: Group
factors.description:
For Comparison-based UKA, select the factor that defines the comparison groups.

Example:
* Test Condition
* Treatment off chip.

 For FC-based UKA, keep it empty.

factors.name: Variable
factors.description:
Select the peptide identifier.

Example:
* ID

factors.name: Supergroup
factors.description:
For Comparison-based UKA, select a factor that identifies the Supergroup. UKA is run for each group comparison within a Supergroup. 
Example:
* Supergroup
* Replicate
* Cell line

For FC-based UKA, this is the factor that defines the observation. 
Example: 
* Sample_name

factors.name: Observation
factors.description:
For Comparison-based UKA, select the factor(s) defining a single value per cell.

Example:
* Barcode and Row
* Barcode and Array
* Sample Name

 For FC-based UKA, keep it empty.

defaultFactors.name: Measurement
defaultFactors.description:
Select the factor that defines the values to use in the computation.

Example:
* log/VSN transform of S100
* log/VSN transform and ComBat Corrected S100
* FC-base UKA: FC.subtract.value

defaultFactors.name: Group
defaultFactors.description:
For Comparison-based UKA, select the factor that defines the comparison groups.

Example:
* Test Condition
* Treatment off chip.

 For FC-based UKA, keep it empty.

defaultFactors.name: Variable
defaultFactors.description:
Select the peptide identifier.

Example:
* ID

defaultFactors.name: Supergroup
defaultFactors.description:
For Comparison-based UKA, select a factor that identifies the Supergroup. UKA is run for each group comparison within a Supergroup. 
Example:
* Supergroup
* Replicate
* Cell line

For FC-based UKA, this is the factor that defines the observation. 
Example: 
* Sample_name

defaultFactors.name: Observation
defaultFactors.description:
For Comparison-based UKA, select the factor(s) defining a single value per cell.

Example:
* Barcode and Row
* Barcode and Array
* Sample Name

 For FC-based UKA, keep it empty.

steps.name: Specificity score histogram
steps.description: Perform computation on user defined projection.

steps.name: Volcano specificity
steps.description: Perform computation on user defined projection.

factors.name: Mean Specificity Score
factors.description:
Select the factor that defines the dot size.

Example:
* Mean Specificity Score

factors.name: Kinase Name
factors.description:
Select the factor that defines the kinase name.

Example:
* Kinase Name

factors.name: Kinase Family
factors.description:
Select a factor defining the Kinase Family or other grouping of kinases. 

Example:
* Kinase Family 
* Kinase Group

factors.name: Sgroup_contrast
factors.description:
Select the factor that defines the comparison. 

Example:
* Sgroup_contrast 
* contrast

factors.name: Median Kinase Statistic
factors.description: Select the factor that defines the fold change. E.g. Kinase Statistic

filters.name: Mean Specificity Score
filters.description: Filter for significant hits. E.g. Specificity Score, Kinase Statistic.
